response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software craftsman, but the role explicitly requires a Senior C++ developer with 8-12 years of C++ experience, message brokers, MQTT/REST IoT work, and IEC 62443 secure development. The resume shows only a brief stint writing C/C++ at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and a bachelor thesis project; the bulk of the career is JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443, MQTT, or relevant industrial protocols. Fit for the core technical bar is weak despite overall seniority.
strengths: 12+ years of professional software experience with senior/staff titles
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, open-source
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only ~6 months at NI a decade ago
No evidence of IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No exposure to industrial automation, MQTT, or protocols like Modbus/OPC UA/IEC 61850

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation / IEC 62443 / MQTT background
Senior-level engineering maturity and distributed systems exposure
